item.title: List of Personal Development Books
item.description: Recommended reading list of personal development and self-improvement books covering mental models, habits, and success.

item.title: DevOps Books
item.description: Recommended reading list of DevOps and infrastructure engineering books covering culture, cloud, containers, infrastructure as code, SRE, and programming languages.
